case_title: CAROLYN CAHN RESPONDENT VS. OLYMPIC VIEW REALITY APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: JUDGE DIANE WICK, CLERK-BETH WILBER, NOTHING ON RECORD: C/C FOR SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL, APPELLANT APPEARS THROUGH AN ATTORNEY, RESPONDENT APPEARS IN PRO PER; PARTIES PRESENT THEIR RESPECTIVE CASES AND EVIDENCE, THEN REST, MATTER IS SUBMITTED; TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT OLYMPIC VIEW REALITY AS TO RESPONDENT CAHN, CAROLYN HEARING SET FOR MAY-13-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
